title: Five Little Peppers and How They Grew
writer: Nathalie Bucknall, Jefferson Parker, J. Robert Bren
actors: Edith Fellows, Clarence Kolb, Dorothy Peterson
plot: The Peppers - Mrs. Pepper and her five children Polly, Ben, Joey, Davie and Phronsie - are a poor family (the six of them sleep in a total of four beds in two rooms), but they love each other and as a result are happy. Mrs. Pepper...
